title: Li Auto Q2 2024 Earnings Preview
text: Li Auto was scheduled to report Q2 2024 earnings on August 28, 2024 before US market open. Li Auto delivered 108,581 vehicles in the second quarter, meeting expectations within its guidance range of between 105,000 and 110,000 vehicles. This represents a 25.48% year-over-year increase and a 35.05% quarter-over-quarter jump from Q1. The company projected second-quarter revenue between RMB 29.9 billion and RMB 31.4 billion ($4.2 billion), marking a 4.2% to 9.4% year-over-year increase. Li Auto's current offerings included the L6, L7, L8, L9 (extended-range electric vehicles), and the Mega (its first battery electric vehicle). The company experienced minimal announcements during Q2 following modest performance of the Mega launch in March. Previously planned all-electric SUV releases for late 2024 were postponed to the first half of 2025. Monthly deliveries rebounded significantly, with July reaching a record 51,000 vehicles, representing 49.41% year-over-year growth. Management hosted a call on August 28 at 8:00 AM US Eastern Time / 8:00 PM Beijing Time.
